english translation text: Ab bhi Sajjad ki aankhon, se lahu jaari haiEven now tears of blood are flowing from the eyes of Imam Sajjad (a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Nange sar shaam kyu gayi zainab hai, Ye hi Sajjad ki bimari hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text: The way Bibi Zainab (s.a.) was taken to Shaam without a veil, this was the cause of Imam Sajjad’s (a.s) illness

urdu transliteration text:
Ab bhi Sajjad ki aankhon, se lahu jaari hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Even now tears of blood are flowing from eyes of Imam Sajjad (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
Garden mei tauq bhari, aur paaon mei chaale hai,Ghairat mei khoon roye, Zanjeer kya sambhale.Logo ummat ne saniye zahra, berida bhi isse guzaari hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The shackles around his neck are heavy and there are blisters on his feet,
He cries tears of blood at the way the women have been treated,
Bibi Zainab was paraded through the crowds of people without her veil

The hands of Ruqayya and Kulsoom are tied in ropes,
The body of Imam Sajjad (a.s.) is injured and the shackles around his neck are very heavy

urdu transliteration text:
Shaami laeen saare, patthar gira rahe theQaidi yateem bache, aansu baha rahe theChaaro jaanib sharaabiyon ka hujoom, khoon roye khara muhari hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The wretched people of Shaam were throwing stones,
The imprisoned orphans were crying,
Surrounded by drunkards on all four sides, Imam (a.s) is standing and weeping

People were throwing stones at the women of the Ahlulbayt (a.s.),
What crime had the daughter of Ali (a.s.) committed that her veil was snatched away from her

urdu transliteration text:
Dekha jo rassiyon me, Fizza ko hubshion neDarbaar hilaa nana, Zainab ki siskiyon neJiska koyi, bhi madadgaar nahi, Haaye ujri, bhi ye lachaari hay
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The tribe of Fizza saw her hands tied in ropes,
The people in Yazid’s court were moved by Bibi Zainab’s crying,
Bibi Zainab (a.s.) has no helper to support her
